feedback.text: In past few months we "gamers" started to see the gray parts of law concerning our beloved free time hobby. And we need to pull all the strings to get some power on our side too (consumers) and don´t leave it all with developers. We let them run wild without significant oversite for years and now we are starting to see the consequences (microtransactions, selling games in unplayable state, predatory pricing, and many more).
